full_name: Hot-rolled stainless steel plate, sheet and strip - grade SUS316
scope: Austenitic 18Cr-12Ni-2.5Mo stainless steel. Molybdenum addition improves pitting and crevice corrosion resistance, especially in chloride environments. Equivalent to AISI 316 / UNS S31600.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted JIS document text
